examples: My bushy tail may make me look much bigger.
Let's see, in his 30s, tall, bushy dark hair, slight northern accent.
I have got a long body, a narrow little head, lots of furs and a big, bushy tail.
In a few short years, I went from bright-eyed and bushy-tailed to seriously burnt out.
The bushy pine and Norway spruce trees I planted serve as a place to build nests.
